title: Heartland Growers
description: Heartland Growers is a full-service wholesale greenhouse located in Westfield, Indiana, owned and operated by the Gapinski Family since 1984. The company supplies wholesale plants to independent garden centers, florists, landscapers, and national chain stores throughout the Midwest. With a modern and capital-intensive facility covering over 30 acres, Heartland Growers produces a variety of plants including bedding plants, geraniums, lilies, and hanging baskets. The company is committed to maintaining quality and service as top priorities for its customers
